title: Performance Benchmark Finding
description: Structured finding from a parallel analysis agent

dimension.description: Rubric dimension name (e.g., 'Algorithmic Scaling', 'Wall-time stability', 'CPU efficiency', 'L1 cache efficiency', 'Last-level cache', 'Branch prediction', 'Memory profile')

file.description: Source file path relative to project root

function.description: Function name where the metric was observed

threshold_pass.description: Rubric PASS threshold for this metric

threshold_fail.description: Rubric FAIL threshold for this metric

evidence.description: Evidence items supporting the score. Each item ties a metric to a specific file, function, and line.

prescription.description: Actionable optimization recommendation. Should reference specific code locations and suggest concrete changes.
